global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with various circular decorative elements and prominent text.
global.main_message: Encourages users to beat rivals with a free trial.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Center decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape located in the center of the ad, possibly representing a game element.

elements.label: Center decorative element
elements.description: Another small circular shape adjacent to the first, maintaining a similar design.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned at the top of the ad, similar in style to the center elements.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: Another small circular shape at the top, complementing the previous decorative elements.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button at the center bottom of the ad with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape at the top left, consistent with the other decorative elements.

elements.label: Center decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape located in the center bottom area, similar to other elements.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape at the top right, matching the design of the other circular elements.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: A bold text statement in the center of the ad, conveying a competitive message.
elements.text_content: Beat your rivals No ads in first week

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo 'NeonArena' displayed prominently at the top of the ad in a bold font.

elements.label: Call to action text
elements.description: A text phrase at the bottom of the ad encouraging users to try the service for free.

elements.label: Top decorative text
elements.description: The abbreviation 'UGC' displayed at the top left, possibly indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and playful, key elements include promotional text and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by decorative elements, the main message in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Beat your rivals, No ads in first week, NeonArena, Try for free, UGC
